overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy RPG showing a white-haired witcher character exploring a shallow marsh at night. The character walks through murky water surrounded by tall reeds and distant mountains under a cloudy, moonlit sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow water along the marsh edge, heading toward denser vegetation

entered.detail: shallow murky water reflecting the night sky
grassy shoreline with small plants and rocks
dark silhouetted mountains against the cloudy sky
dense dark forest lining the marsh edge
dark overcast sky with patches of moonlight breaking through
tall grass reeds growing at the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The witcher walks through shallow marsh water alongside a grassy bank. Distant mountains and a pine forest are visible under the cloudy night sky, with tall reeds growing along the water's edge.

events.description: camera passes through tall reeds that temporarily obscure the view of the character

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through dense tall reeds in the marsh, pushing through the vegetation

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the marsh, the character passes through dense tall reeds that partially obscure the camera view. The water remains shallow as the vegetation closes in from both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marsh with scattered dead trees

events.description: character turns slightly to survey the surroundings while continuing to walk through the water

agents.ego_description: walking through open water and glancing around the marsh environment, approaching the grassy bank

entered.detail: leafless dead tree trunk standing in the shallow water

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dense reeds, the character continues exploring the open marsh. A dead tree becomes visible on the left as the grassy bank returns to view, with mountains still looming in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit marshland that transitions from an open shoreline into a dense thicket before emerging back into a wide expanse. It begins with the witcher walking through shallow water alongside a grassy bank, with distant mountains and a pine forest visible under a cloudy night sky. As the character moves deeper into the marsh, the view becomes partially obscured by tall, dense reeds that close in from both sides. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the vegetation, revealing a dead tree on the left and the return of the grassy bank. Finally, the camera continues across the open marsh with the looming mountains remaining steady in the background.
